title: Viewer namespace configuration
description: Controls which annotation tools are available and to which roles, plus viewer-level download/print gates and stamp library.

tools.highlight.enabled.description: Allow users to draw highlight rectangles on documents.

tools.comment.enabled.description: Allow users to place comment annotations.

tools.stamp.enabled.description: Allow users to place stamp overlays (Approved, Rejected, etc.).

tools.sign.enabled.description: Allow users to draw freehand signatures on documents.

tools.redact.enabled.description: Allow users to create redaction regions.

tools.highlight.roles.description: Roles allowed to use the highlight tool.

tools.comment.roles.description: Roles allowed to use the comment tool.

tools.stamp.roles.description: Roles allowed to use the stamp tool.

tools.sign.roles.description: Roles allowed to use the sign tool.

tools.redact.roles.description: Roles allowed to use the redact tool.

stamp_library.description: Bank-specific stamp definitions rendered in the stamp picker.

redaction_burn_in_immediate.description: When true, client-side pdf-lib burn-in fires immediately on export; when false, server-side Python pipeline is used exclusively.

version_compare_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain old document versions for comparison. 0 = unlimited.

print_enabled.description: Allow users to print documents from the viewer.

download_enabled.description: Allow users to download documents from the viewer.
